description: The apartment is located in a quiet neighborhood . Fully furnished. Linens and towels are provided. It's two blocks away from downtown Albany, and the Palace theater.

Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to vibrant downtown dining, shops, and exciting attractions.

The lovely design and prime location will leave you in awe.

✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom
✔ On-Demand Hot & Cold Filtered Water
✔ Open Design Living
✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen
✔ Smart TV & High-Speed Wi-Fi
✔ Free Parking

See more below!

Spacious studio with hardwood floors, fully equipped kitchen, clean and bright. Large modern bath . Full Cable TV and WiFi. Walking distance to the new Renaissance Hotel.
Walk to everything downtown! The Empire Plaza and the Egg are across the street.You can't get any closer, to the MVP Arena, as well as Restaurants, bars, churches. Walk to Capital and the new Capital Convention Center. Laundry facilities in the apartment
Updated 3-bedroom home in Pine Hills near hospitals, bars, and UAlbany—2 full baths, central air, full kitchen, dining room + den with futon.

Step into the charming and comfy 1BR/1BA apartment in the heart of Albany, NY. It promises a relaxing retreat bordering picturesque Washington Park and funky Lark Street while being within walking distance to the vibrant downtown, which offers easy access to restaurants, shops, and exciting attractions.

The lovely design and the prime location will leave you in awe.

✔ Comfy Queen Bedroom
✔ Open Design Living
✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen
✔ Smart TV
✔ Wi-Fi
✔ Free Parking

host_about: I am a real down to earth & cool person.

Hello! I’m a proud resident of Albany, NY, where i both live and work With a background in real estate and management, I bring years of expertise to hosting and caring for my own property here in Albany. In addition to managing vacation rentals, I also own a Japanese restaurant, so hospitality and guest satisfaction are at the heart of everything I do.

I look forward to welcoming you to Albany and sharing the best of the city with you!

I am an Albany native .I have lived in Ireland and had a B & B in Tramore County Waterford back in the early nineties. While doing so we met a lot of wonderful people. I have been in the real estate business for over 30 years . I believe in keeping the mind and body fit. I am easy going and love a good laugh.

I'm Irish living in Albany NY.  I have 3 grown up kids.  I have 2 chihuauas    I am visiting Toronto to meet my sister and nephew who are visiting from Ireland.  Don't smoke or drink just love my dogs!

I was born in Poland but grew up in NY and now i'm back in NY after grad school in Europe.  I love sailing, flying gliders, hiking, hammocks, cycling, photography, travel, minimalism, tennis,  podcasts, biohacking and my KJV.  I started traveling airbnb during my time in Europe and now I’m a host in NY!
